import math
import torch
import torch.nn as nn


class SAKTModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, d_model=256, n_heads=8, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2, max_len=256):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = int(num_skills)
        self.d_model = int(d_model)
        self.max_len = int(max_len)
        self.inter_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * self.num_skills, d_model)
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(self.num_skills, d_model)
        self.pos_emb = nn.Embedding(max_len, d_model)
        enc_layer = nn.TransformerEncoderLayer(
            d_model=d_model,
            nhead=n_heads,
            dim_feedforward=d_model * 4,
            dropout=dropout,
            activation='gelu',
            batch_first=True,
            norm_first=True,
        )
        self.encoder = nn.TransformerEncoder(enc_layer, num_layers=num_layers)
        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(d_model)
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(d_model * 2, d_model),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(d_model, 1),
        )

    def forward(self, hist_skills, hist_corrects, query_skills):
        # hist_*: [B,L], query_skills: [B,L], predict query at each causal position from history <= position
        B, L = hist_skills.shape
        x_ids = hist_skills.long() + self.num_skills * hist_corrects.long().clamp(0, 1)
        pos = torch.arange(L, device=hist_skills.device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, L).clamp(max=self.max_len - 1)
        x = self.inter_emb(x_ids) + self.pos_emb(pos)
        # causal mask blocks attending to future history positions
        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(L, L, device=hist_skills.device, dtype=torch.bool), diagonal=1)
        h = self.encoder(x, mask=mask)
        h = self.norm(h)
        q = self.skill_emb(query_skills.long())
        logits = self.out(torch.cat([h, q], dim=-1)).squeeze(-1)
        return logits
